nasb.text: He was twenty-five years old when he became king, and he reigned sixteen years in Jerusalem; and his mother’s name was Jerusha the daughter of Zadok.

esv.text: He was twenty-five years old when he began to reign, and he reigned sixteen years in Jerusalem. His mother’s name was Jerusha the daughter of Zadok.

cnv.text: 他登基的時候是二十五歲，在耶路撒冷作王十六年。他母親名叫耶路沙，是撒督的女兒。

ccb.text: 他二十五岁登基，在耶路撒冷执政十六年。他母亲叫耶路莎，是撒督的女儿。
